name: icdwise
description: Verified ICD-10-CM medical code lookup, validation & reverse search for AI agents — not guesses.
long_description: Look up, validate, and reverse-search ICD-10-CM medical diagnosis codes against the official code set (~74k codes) — get the official description for a code, confirm a code is valid, or find codes by description, with an honest "not found" instead of a fabricated code. All data bundled, runs locally, no key.

tools.name: lookup_icd10
tools.description: Get the official description for an ICD-10-CM code.

tools.name: validate_icd10
tools.description: Check whether an ICD-10-CM code is valid.

tools.name: search_icd10
tools.description: Find ICD-10-CM codes by description (reverse lookup).
